report.summary: Community cycle v10 (scheduled task): Drafted 3 tweets (#232-234) covering geopolitical crash explainer (Iran/oil driving crypto sell-off), ETH vs SOL comparison thread (SEC commodity ruling catalyst), and weekend fear check by-the-numbers. Updated newsletter v38 with weekend addendum #3 on 601-page milestone and geopolitical context. Created SVG social card: Geopolitical Divergence (1200x630, dual-column macro fear vs smart money signal). Discord/TG Saturday night community update drafted. 601 pages published, 234 total tweets drafted, 53+ SVG cards created.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #232: Geopolitical Crash Explained — Iran Bab el-Mandeb threat → oil >$100 → Dow/Nasdaq correction → BTC follows risk assets. Crypto fundamentals improving (SEC commodity ruling, staking ETFs legal, whale accumulation). Links to crypto-regulations-2026-guide. Scheduled: Wed Apr 1, 12PM ET.

Tweet #233: ETH vs SOL Thread (3 parts) — ETH $1,985 (-60%) vs SOL $83 (-72%), both now digital commodities, staking ETFs legal for both. ETH has liquidity moat + DeFi TVL 10x; SOL has speed + Firedancer. Links to compare/ethereum-vs-solana. Scheduled: Wed Apr 1, 3PM ET.

Tweet #234: Weekend Fear Check By The Numbers — BTC $66K, F&G 12/100, 50-day streak, -24.6% YTD, $80B shed, $450M liquidated, 270K BTC whale accumulation, 5.88% exchange supply (ATL). Two stories, smart money says #2. Scheduled: Thu Apr 2, 12PM ET.
Discord/TG: Saturday Night Community Update — Full market snapshot, 601 pages milestone, 4 in queue, tool recommendations for the weekend, accumulation narrative.

Newsletter v38 Addendum #3: 601 pages milestone + geopolitical crash explanation (oil > $100, Iran-Israel, macro not crypto fear) + next week preview (Telegram Mini Apps, Onchain Forex guides coming).
Content calendar extended through Thu Apr 2 — 10 scheduled pieces: 9 tweets + 1 newsletter across Twitter, Discord/TG, Email.

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: Geopolitical Divergence (1200x630) — Dark glass-morphism dual-column design. Left column 'THE MACRO FEAR' (red): BTC $66,008 (-48% ATH, -24.6% YTD), F&G 12/100 (50-day record), Oil >$100/bbl (Iran threat), $450M liquidations. Right column 'THE SMART MONEY SIGNAL' (green): 270K BTC whale accumulation, 5.88% exchange supply (ATL), SEC 16 tokens as commodities, 3/3 historical pattern. Purple historical comparison bar: post-FTX +94%, COVID +1,180%, crypto winter +306%, now Day 50. Footer with ETH/SOL prices, market cap, 601 pages, 234 tweets. Saved to reports/community-drafts/2026-03-28-social-card-geopolitical-divergence.svg
